author: kapilt
text: sphinx extension for docs from json schema

author: kapilt
text: given our utilization of json schema, it would be nice to have documentation auto extract a filter/actions parameters into the docs directly from their respective schema.

author: kapilt
text: kapilt added help wanted scope/large area/docs on Nov 2, 2016

author: scotwk
text:
[@kapilt](https://github.com/kapilt) - I attached a screenshot of an example for EC2's docs. Is this what you mean? I extracted the schema attribute from the filter classes and display it inline with the filter name. It would probably be nice to display it a little cleaner, although pretty-printing it would take up a ton of vertical real-estate.

[![screen shot 2016-11-18 at 12 24 52 am](https://cloud.githubusercontent.com/assets/2279506/20419583/8084b9e0-ad25-11e6-8f22-a7f9578089b6.png)](https://cloud.githubusercontent.com/assets/2279506/20419583/8084b9e0-ad25-11e6-8f22-a7f9578089b6.png)
